meta.title: SOAR B2B — Turn Companies Into Booked Meetings
meta.description: Reach verified businesses, engage real decision-makers, and convert outreach into meetings. B2B appointment engine for manufacturers and wholesalers.

hero.title: Turn the right companies into booked meetings.
hero.description: Find real companies, reach the right decision-makers, and turn attention into meetings.

whatYouGet.title: What You Get
whatYouGet.subtitle: Outputs that turn exposure into meetings

items.title: Verified Company Lists
items.description: Business locations with addresses, contacts, and website links. Exportable to CRM.

items.title: Decision-Maker Targeting
items.description: Department and role mapping. Procurement, operations, management — the roles that buy.

items.title: Location-Accurate Reach
items.description: Precision geo-targeting for radius-based campaigns. Verified addresses, not estimates.

items.title: Persona-Based Exposure
items.description: Role-focused messaging and targeting criteria. Ready for LinkedIn, Meta, Google Ads.

items.title: Meeting-Driven Campaigns
items.description: Optimized landing pages and meeting request forms. Single, clear call-to-action.

items.title: Active + Passive Tracking
items.description: Monitor both direct responses and passive engagement. Full visibility into conversion path.

items.title: CRM-Ready Export
items.description: Pre-mapped fields: company, address, role, contact, email/phone. One-click export.

items.title: Performance Visibility
items.description: Response rates, meeting requests, conversion tracking. Real numbers, not vanity metrics.

sequence.title: The Sequence
sequence.subtitle: Start with low-cost, permission-based outreach. Scale to targeted ads. Then direct access.
